description:
You are an infrastructure-automation engineer who has just landed in a half-finished demo environment under /home/user.  
    Several input files already exist inside /home/user/data.  
    Your objective is to process those files with awk and sed only (no python, perl, jq …), generate two output artefacts in /home/user/reports, and leave the original source files untouched.

    Existing input files and their purpose (you do NOT have to re-create them):
      • /home/user/data/servers.cfg  
        – 1 server per line, free-form, but always containing three labelled tokens in this exact order:
          server_id:<NAME>  status=<STATE>  ip=<IPV4>
        – Example pattern (do NOT hard-code):  
          server_id:srv-alpha status=active ip=10.17.2.3

      • /home/user/data/ports.list  
        – Plain list, one port number per line, no extra whitespace or comments.

      • /home/user/data/provision.log  
        – A chronological free-form log of the last provisioning run.

    Your tasks

    1. Parse /home/user/data/servers.cfg with awk and create a new file  
       /home/user/reports/active_servers.csv that contains *only* the ip addresses of servers whose status=active,  
       written on a single line and separated by exactly one comma.  
       No trailing comma or newline at the end of the file. Example of correct format with three servers:  
       10.17.2.3,10.17.2.4,10.17.2.8

    2. Produce /home/user/reports/summary_report.txt that must consist of exactly 4 lines **in this strict order**:

          ACTIVE_SERVERS=<number>
          INACTIVE_SERVERS=<number>
          TOTAL_PORTS_DEFINED=<number>
          LAST_PROVISION_EVENT=<the very last line of /home/user/data/provision.log with all leading/trailing spaces removed>

       • The counts must be derived with awk (you may combine with sed or pipes as needed).  
       • The last line of provision.log must be captured with sed (no tail).

    3. Both /home/user/reports/active_servers.csv and /home/user/reports/summary_report.txt must be world-readable (chmod 644) and must not contain any extra blank lines or spaces.

    Verification hints  
    • Automated tests will cat the two output files and compare verbatim.  
    • The test framework will also stat the files for correct permissions.  
    • Do not delete, move or rename anything outside /home/user/reports.
truth:
Initial state (pre-populated before the agent starts)

    Directories:
      /home/user/data                (rwxr-xr-x)
      /home/user/reports             (rwxr-xr-x and initially empty)

    /home/user/data/servers.cfg  (rw-r--r--)
        server_id:srv-alpha   status=active   ip=10.10.1.11
        server_id:srv-beta    status=inactive ip=10.10.1.12
        server_id:srv-gamma   status=active   ip=10.10.1.13
        server_id:srv-delta   status=inactive ip=10.10.1.14
        server_id:srv-epsilon status=active   ip=10.10.1.15

    /home/user/data/ports.list  (rw-r--r--)
        22
        80
        443
        8080
        8443
        3306
        5432

    /home/user/data/provision.log (rw-r--r--)
        2023-06-12T08:12:17Z Started provisioning alpha
        2023-06-12T08:12:38Z alpha: packages installed
        2023-06-12T08:13:01Z Finished provisioning alpha
        2023-06-12T08:14:07Z Started provisioning beta
        2023-06-12T08:14:42Z beta: dependency failure
        2023-06-12T08:14:45Z Finished provisioning beta with error

    Expected artefacts after correct execution by the agent

    /home/user/reports/active_servers.csv (rw-r--r--)
        10.10.1.11,10.10.1.13,10.10.1.15   ← single line, no trailing newline

    /home/user/reports/summary_report.txt  (rw-r--r--)
        ACTIVE_SERVERS=3
        INACTIVE_SERVERS=2
        TOTAL_PORTS_DEFINED=7
        LAST_PROVISION_EVENT=2023-06-12T08:14:45Z Finished provisioning beta with error

    Permission requirements checked by the grader
        –mode 644 for both files in /home/user/reports
